deploy.startCommand: python -c "import os; skip={'PATH','HOME','USER','SHELL','TERM','LANG','PWD','SHLVL','HOSTNAME','_'}; keys=sorted([k for k in os.environ if k not in skip and not k.startswith('PYTHON') and not k.startswith('PIP')]); print('ALL env vars:', keys)" && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python manage.py migrate_schemas --shared && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 120
